Documentation

Everything you need to get started and master HyprSpaceOS. Our full wiki is hosted externally.

Getting Started →

Installation guide, first boot, and initial setup walkthrough.

Configuration →

Customize Hyprland, Waybar, themes, keybinds, and more.

Package Management →

Using pacman, AUR helpers, and managing your software.

Troubleshooting →

Common issues, fixes, and debugging tips for HyprSpaceOS.

Hyprland Deep Dive →

Master Hyprland config, animations, window rules, and workspace management.

Contributing →
